results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: embedchain/embedchain/app.py
SUBSYSTEM: embedchain/embedchain/loaders - ingestion layer for pulling source data into the memory pipeline
SUBSYSTEM: embedchain/embedchain/chunkers - transforms loaded content into retrieval-friendly chunks before embedding/storage
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/vector_stores - persistence and similarity-search backend for stored memory embeddings

ENTRYPOINT: embedchain/embedchain/app.py
SUBSYSTEM: embedchain/embedchain/loaders - ingestion layer for pulling raw content from many source types into the memory flow
SUBSYSTEM: embedchain/embedchain/chunkers - preprocessing layer that turns loaded content into chunks before embedding/storage
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/vector_stores - backend storage/retrieval layer that persists vectors and powers memory lookup

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py - orchestrates hybrid search, smart adds, and conversation-memory handling before results are synced back through the API
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - core Mem0 pipeline for fact extraction, update/dedupe decisions, vector writes, graph writes, and search
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/vector_stores - pluggable persistence/retrieval layer backing memory add, search, and delete across storage providers

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/memory.py - builds the shared Mem0 client and runtime config, including LLM/embedder/vector/graph provider wiring and fork-specific patches.
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - owns the core add/search/update flow: fact extraction, dedup/action selection, vector writes, history, and graph dispatch.
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/graph_memory.py - owns Neo4j entity/relationship extraction and graph search, which is the graph half of the hybrid memory pipeline.

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/main.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py - primary ingest/search layer; validates requests and syncs SQL metadata/state around memory operations
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py - orchestration for hybrid search, dedup, smart fact extraction, conversation handling, and related-memory ranking
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - core engine that executes add/search/update/delete across embeddings, vector storage, graph storage, and history

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/main.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py - primary add/search/conversation ingress; hands requests into the memory pipeline and syncs results into SQLite
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py - fork-specific orchestration for hybrid search, fact extraction/review, dedup, and async graph enrichment
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - core mem0 engine that actually embeds, vector-searches, and writes vector plus graph memory state
